title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
